name: Rose Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry to a rectangle measuring 20 x 15 inches (50 x 40 cm) and brush with the soft fat.
2. Sprinkle evenly with the filling ingredients.
3. Roll up like a Swiss roll, starting from the longer side.
4. Cut the roll into 15 equal pieces.
5. Grease a round cake tin with removable rim (bottom) measuring 10 inches (26 cm) in diameter and place the pastry pieces upright in it.
6. Brush the surface with milk.
7. BAKE: moderately hot
TIME: 35-55 minutes
